data.title: Crypto Strategist Predicts Over 500% Moonshot for XRP, Says People Will Talk About Payments Altcoin Soon
data.description:
An analyst known for making timely altcoin calls believes that XRP is gearing up for a massive move to new all-time highs and beyond. Crypto trader Credible tells his 475,800 followers on X that he believes the payments altcoin is poised to break out to new all-time highs in the short term.
source: https://dailyhodl.com/2025/08/24/crypto-strategist-predicts-over-500-moonshot-for-xrp-says-people-will-talk-about-payments-altcoin-soon/

data.title: Binance Market Update (2025-08-24)
data.description:
The global cryptocurrency market cap now stands at $3.99T, up by 4.05% over the last day, according to CoinMarketCap data.

Bitcoin (BTC) has been trading between $114,560 and $115,781 over the past 24 hours. As of 09:30 AM (UTC) today, BTC is trading at $114,833, down by -0.67%.

Most major cryptocurrencies by market cap are trading mixed. Market outperformers include BIO, RAD, and HAEDAL, up by 25%, 17%, and 12%, respectively.

Top stories of the day:

U.S. Labor Market Decline May Spark Federal Reserve Rate Adjustments, Analysts Say

Fosun Wealth Holdings Joins DBS Bank in Distributing Tokenized Notes

Bitcoin's On-Chain Liquidity Shows Signs of Recovery

Institutional Investors Face Challenges in Crypto Market, Warns Custodia CEO

Ethereum News Today: Ethereum Hits New All-Time High Above $4,870 as Fed Turns Dovish, ETFs Drive Bullish Momentum

Ethereum News: Ethereum Rally Gains Momentum, On-Chain Growth and Investor Optimism Pave Path to $5K ETH

Tom Lee: Ethereum Has Over 50% Chance of Surpassing Bitcoin’s Market Cap

Analyst: Bitcoin Pullback Finds Support at $112K as Short-Term Holder Cost Becomes Key Level

Market movers:

ETH: $4775.68 (+1.21%)

data.title: Altcoin Season Index Declines to 46, Indicating Shift in Market Trends
data.description:
According to BlockBeats, data from Coinmarketcap reveals that the Altcoin Season Index has decreased to 46, down from 50 the previous day. This index indicates that in the past 90 days, approximately 46 out of the top 100 cryptocurrencies by market capitalization have outperformed Bitcoin.

The CMC Altcoin Season Index serves as a real-time indicator to assess whether the cryptocurrency market is currently dominated by altcoins. It is based on the performance of the top 100 altcoins relative to Bitcoin over the last 90 days.

data.title: Hut 8 Corp. Announces $1 Billion Fundraising Plan Through Stock Sales
data.description: According to Foresight News, U.S.-listed Bitcoin mining company Hut 8 Corp. has updated its market equity plan, aiming to raise up to $1 billion through stock sales. This new initiative replaces the previous $500 million ATM plan launched in December 2024. Earlier this week, the company commenced construction on a $2.5 billion artificial intelligence data center in West Feliciana Parish, Louisiana.

data.title: Bitcoin Network Sees Lowest Transaction Fees Since 2011
data.description: According to BlockBeats, recent data from Glassnode indicates that the daily transaction fees on the Bitcoin network have dropped to approximately 4.09 BTC. This marks the lowest level in Bitcoin-denominated fees since the end of 2011.

data.title: Hong Kong's Stablecoin Positioned as a Payment Tool, Says Official
data.description: According to BlockBeats, Hong Kong's Secretary for Financial Services and the Treasury, Christopher Hui, has clarified the role of Hong Kong's stablecoin. He stated that the stablecoin is clearly positioned as a payment tool and represents another form of legal tender, with no speculative opportunities. Hui advised the public to exercise caution. He further noted that while payment costs through the banking system could reach up to 3%, using stablecoins could potentially reduce these costs to as low as 1%, thereby lowering cross-border payment expenses and enhancing economic efficiency.

data.title: Ethereum PoS Network Faces High Exit Queue and Withdrawal Delays
data.description:
According to BlockBeats, the Ethereum Proof-of-Stake (PoS) network is experiencing a significant exit queue, with approximately 870,300 ETH currently pending withdrawal. This amount is valued at around $4.16 billion based on current prices. The withdrawal delay has extended to 15 days and 3 hours.

In contrast, the demand for staking from new validators has seen a slight decrease. The current activation queue stands at 143,000 ETH, valued at approximately $683 million, with a queue time of 2 days and 12 hours.
